articles.title: Premier League, Wolverhampton is the first team to be relegated
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, APRIL 20 - The 0-0 draw between Crystal Palace and fourth-last West Ham in the postponement of the 33rd matchday of the Premier League condemns Wolverhampton to being the first team to be relegated in the English championship.
